attrs.description: Low resolution reduced dataset for documentation and testing purposes

recipe.description: Low resolution reduced dataset for documentation purposes
recipe.name: aifs-ea-an-oper-0001-mars-o48-2020-2021-6h-v1

attrs.description:
Subset of cerra-rr-an-oper-0001-mars-5p5km-1984-2020-6h-v2-hmsi,
at 0.2 degree resolution and reduced area to fit square grid inside the lambert conformal grid, and
comprising only 10 days and a reduced set of parameters for the purpose of integration tests,
HARMONIE-ALADIN reanalysis by SMHI on EURO-CORDEX domain (CERRA project)
Note that the data includes relative humidity (r), not specific humidity (q).
